card.title: cross-viewport UI reliability and layout hardening
card.summary: Unify phone, browser, and installed-app geometry so menu, play, Options, and Pause share measured safe content, status, overlay, and fallback-background rules.
card.objective: Remove physical-device clipping, overlap, inconsistent sibling layouts, fake scroll affordances, and purple safe-area bleed without introducing screenshot-specific offsets.
acceptanceCriteria: Menu and play use one contained two-row status layout beside Pause at phone widths.
Options and Pause share guide, control-row, scroll, and pinned-action geometry.
Page, app, Phaser, theme, and installed-app fallback backgrounds do not expose purple safe-area bands.
Fresh physical iPhone Safari and installed-PWA proof confirms the deployed preview.
discoveries: The operator's seven iPhone captures exposed status-panel drift, clipped guide and toggle copy, Move Speed overlap, fake rail presentation, and purple top/bottom fallback fields.
The final deployed diagnostics needed to suppress invisible rail geometry as well as the rail drawing itself.
nextActions: Review the READY PR #72 preview on physical iPhone Safari and the installed PWA.
Merge only after the phone review confirms no clipping, overlap, purple bleed, or sibling-surface drift.
Keep canonical Mazer production unchanged until an explicit project-specific release approval.
blockers: Fresh operator physical-iPhone Safari and installed-PWA proof is still required.
evidence: Focused viewport/layout/safe-area/scene checks passed 57/57; correlated repository coverage passed 362/362; lint, build, and diff checks passed.
Deployed 390x844 proof confirmed textFits status panels, Options track/thumb null without overflow, Pause maxOffset 244, reachable fixed actions, and rgb(2, 8, 15) body/app backgrounds.

entry.headline: Physical iPhone UI defects corrected and deployed for review
completed: Normalized menu/play status, Options/Pause composition, guide width, described rows, Move Speed lanes, and safe-area fallback colors.
Added truthful no-overflow scroll diagnostics and route-aware phone preview proof.
Published the focused correction to existing draft PR #72 without changing production.
discovered: Desktop and emulated proof alone did not expose all defects visible in the operator's physical iPhone captures.
next: Collect fresh physical iPhone Safari and installed-PWA screenshots against the READY preview.
Merge and complete only if that review is clean.
blockers: Fresh physical iPhone review remains external acceptance evidence.

card.title: shared menu and play run status panel
card.summary: Use one two-row status component in menu AI and active play for time, contextual rank, score out of 100, and maze level.
card.objective: Make menu and play progression information visually identical, readable, and contained while preserving the canonical score-data boundary.
acceptanceCriteria: Menu and play consume the same status-panel layout and formatting contract.
Time and contextual Rank, Score out of 100, and Maze Lvl remain readable at phone and desktop widths.
The play panel fits its measured lane beside Pause without overlap.
Displayed score remains traceable to the canonical run-quality contract.
discoveries: The physical iPhone capture showed the menu badge and active-play badge using different content and geometry.
A 236 by 58 two-row panel fits the measured phone lane in both contexts.
nextActions: Review the PR #72 panel on physical iPhone Safari and installed PWA.
Confirm final score-field authority before terminal completion.
Merge the shared panel only after the linked viewport review is clean.
blockers: Fresh physical iPhone proof and final canonical score-field traceability remain required.
evidence: Focused status/layout proof passed inside the 57/57 UI packet.
READY preview dpl_7zx3HAry5zipJXBwyL6KpSP6RXCS reported matching 236 by 58 menu/play panels with textFits true.

entry.headline: Shared menu and play status panel implemented
completed: Replaced sibling-specific status geometry with one two-row layout resolver.
Measured active-play status beside Pause instead of centering into its lane.
Added phone-width containment and exact deployed diagnostic proof.
discovered: Final completion still depends on physical-device review and canonical score-field traceability.
next: Advance to Review after exact implementation journal readback.
Keep terminal completion blocked on the remaining evidence.
blockers: Fresh physical iPhone review and canonical score-field traceability remain open.
